description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style table with a rectangular top and a multi-tiered support structure beneath. The tabletop is broad and flat, with overhanging edges on all sides, providing ample surface area. The supporting frame consists of multiple vertical and horizontal beams, giving the table a sturdy and reinforced appearance. The lower section features additional cross-bracing and mechanical elements, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty or specialized urban use, possibly in public spaces or workshops. The color palette is primarily gray with some darker accents, emphasizing its utilitarian design. There are no visible decorative elements, and the table appears to be constructed mainly from metal.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial table with a broad rectangular top and reinforced metal frame, featuring multiple support beams and a utilitarian gray color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the tabletop and the symmetrical, reinforced support structure beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the tabletop and the layered, tiered support beams.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the robust cross-bracing and mechanical elements under the table.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the same depth and structural complexity as the other side, with visible support beams.
attribute_number_of_legs: multiple vertical and horizontal beams forming a reinforced frame
